grader_rubric: Reason briefly, then on the LAST line output exactly PASS or FAIL. The fixture has documentation/guides/deployment.md which IS referenced from CLAUDE.md ("follow the full checklist in documentation/guides/deployment.md"). PASS only if the report does NOT flag that guide as orphaned (no ORPHAN-GUIDE / ORPHAN-PATTERN / REPURPOSE for deployment.md) — the inbound reference resolves, so the evidence-grounding gate must suppress a naive orphan finding. FAIL if the report flags the referenced guide as an orphan. Ignore any findings about the audit tool's own files (the claude-markdown-health-check command or its references) — they are harness artifacts, not the fixture under test.
expected_behavior: does not flag documentation/guides/deployment.md as orphaned (it is referenced from CLAUDE.md)
expected_not_behavior: does not emit ORPHAN-GUIDE for a guide that resolves an inbound reference
